name: Alphabet Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 milk for brushing on top of
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter or margarine with an electric mixer until soft.
2. Add 3/4 cup sugar and beat until fluffy.
3. Add egg and vanilla or almond extract, then beat again.
4. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt together in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture.
6. Divide the dough into two parts, wrap each in plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
7. Form small balls of dough and roll into ropes.
8. Shape the ropes into numbers or letters on an ungreased cookie sheet, leaving space between them.
9. Brush with a little milk and sprinkle with sugar.
10. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 10 minutes.
11. Cool on a rack.
